results.question: What are the core collaboration hours employees are expected to be available?
results.answer: Core collaboration hours are 10:00 AM to 3:00 PM local time (doc_id=01_employee_handbook_overview.md, title=01 employee handbook overview).

Employees are classified as full-time, part-time, temporary, or intern. Classification affects benefits eligibility, paid leave, and overtime treatment. HR maintains classification records and resolves disputes.

Core collaboration hours are 10:00 AM to 3:00 PM local time. Outside this period, teams may set flexib

Northstar Analytics uses role-based access control with least-privilege principles.

results.question: How soon should compensation discrepancies be reported after payroll?
Is retaliation against someone who reports an ethics concern allowed?
results.gold: No, retaliation for good-faith reporting is prohibited.
results.answer: No, retaliation is strictly prohibited. The policy explicitly states that good-faith reporting is protected and classifies retaliation as a policy violation (doc_id=02_code_of_conduct_and_ethics.md; title=02 code of conduct and ethics). Additionally, retaliation against any individual who makes a report in good faith is explicitly listed as prohibited behavior under the Respectful Workplace standards (doc_id=02_code_of_conduct_and_ethics.md; title=02 code of conduct and ethics).

citations.title: 02 code of conduct and ethics
citations.snippet:
## 7. Confidentiality and Data Handling
Employees must safeguard confidential business, customer, and employee data. Confidential information may only be used for authorized business purposes and shared on a need-to-know basis.

## 8. Communications and Public Statements
Only authorized spokespeople may make public statements on behalf of Northstar Analytics. Social media use m

citations.title: 02 code of conduct and ethics
citations.snippet:
## 5. Conflicts of Interest
Personnel must disclose actual or potential conflicts to Compliance. Common examples:
- Financial interests in competitors or suppliers
- Hiring or supervising family members without disclosure
- Accepting outside employment that impairs performance

Disclosed conflicts are assessed and may be mitigated through recusal, reassignment, or written restr

Discrimination, harassment, bullying, retaliation, and intimidation are prohibited. Protected traits include age, race, color, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, disability, marital status, pregnancy status, veteran status, and other legally protected categories.

Examples of prohibited behavior include:
- Unwanted sexual comments, jo

- Coaching or training
- Written warning
- Loss of privileges
- Suspension
- Termination
- Referral to law enforcement where appl

results.question: Are cash gifts ever permitted under the gifts and anti-bribery rules?
What is the patch deadline for critical vulnerabilities?
results.answer: Critical vulnerabilities must be patched or mitigated within 7 days (doc_id=03_information_security_policy.md; title=03 information security policy). Exceptions to this deadline require documented risk acceptance and the implementation of compensating controls.

citations.title: 03 information security policy
citations.snippet:
## 10. Vulnerability and Patch Management
- Critical vulnerabilities: patch or mitigate within 7 days.
- High vulnerabilities: patch within 30 days.
- Medium vulnerabilities: patch within 90 days.

Exceptions require documented risk acceptance and compensating controls.

## 11. Secure Development
Engineering teams must apply secure coding practices and perform:
- Pull request r

results.question: Is multi-factor authentication required for business-critical applications?
results.gold: Yes, MFA is required for all business-critical applications.
results.answer: Yes, multi-factor authentication is required for all business-critical applications (doc_id=03_information_security_policy.md; title=03 information security policy).

citations.title: 03 information security policy
citations.snippet:
## 4. Identity and Authentication
- Unique user IDs are required.
- Shared accounts are prohibited except approved service accounts.
- Multi-factor authentication is required for all business-critical applications.
- Passwords must meet complexity and rotation standards or use approved passwordless methods.

## 5. Access Control
Access is granted based on business need and appr

citations.title: 04 access control standard
citations.snippet:
## 11. Authentication Standards
- Password length minimum aligned with security baseline.
- Password reuse restrictions enforced through identity provider.
- MFA required for all remote access and sensitive tools.
- Session timeouts required for admin consoles.

## 12. Logging and Alerting
Systems must log authentication attempts, privilege changes, and critical authorization f

citations.title: 04 access control standard
citations.snippet:
## 5. Access Request Requirements
Each request must include:
- Business justification
- Requested scope
- Duration (for temporary access)
- Linked ticket ID

Requests without complete justification are rejected.

## 6. Privileged Access Controls
Privileged accounts must:
- Use MFA
- Be time-limited when possible
- Be logged for session activity
- Avoid daily productivity tasks

- Critical systems: monthly review
- High-risk systems: quarterly review

- Ability to both initiate and approve payments

results.question: What is the default retention period for financial accounting records?
results.answer: The default retention period for financial accounting records is 7 years (doc_id=05_data_classification_and_retention_policy.md, title=05 data classification and retention policy).

citations.title: 05 data classification and retention policy
citations.snippet:
## 6. Retention Schedule
Minimum schedule unless legal hold requires longer retention:
- HR personnel records: 7 years after separation
- Financial accounting records: 7 years
- Customer contracts: 7 years after expiration
- Security logs: 1 year minimum, 3 years for critical systems
- Support tickets: 2 years after closure
- Product analytics events: 18 months unless anonymize

results.question: What happens to deletion when Legal places a legal hold?
results.gold: Deletion/alteration must stop immediately for relevant data.
results.answer: When Legal issues a legal hold notice, the deletion and alteration of relevant data must stop immediately. System owners are also required to confirm the enforcement of the hold in writing (doc_id=05_data_classification_and_retention_policy.md; title=05 data classification and retention policy).

results.question: What is the standard timeline for responding to a verified data subject request?
results.gold: 30 days, with lawful extension if needed.
results.answer: The standard response target for a verified data subject request is 30 days from verification. This timeline may be extended if the request involves high complexity, provided the extension is lawful and the reason is communicated to the requester [doc_id=07_privacy_and_data_subject_rights_procedure.md; title=07 privacy and data subject rights procedure].

citations.title: 07 privacy and data subject rights procedure
citations.snippet:
## 7. Timelines
Standard response target is 30 days from verification, subject to lawful extension where complexity is high. Extensions must be communicated with reason.

## 8. Internal Fulfillment Workflow
- Privacy team triages request scope.
- Data owners gather records from systems of record.
- Legal validates exemptions and response language.
- Privacy team issues response

results.question: Can employees use public Wi-Fi for company work without VPN?
results.gold: No, public Wi-Fi requires VPN with MFA.
results.answer: No. According to the 08 remote work and device policy (doc_id=08_remote_work_and_device_policy.md), public Wi-Fi requires a VPN with MFA for company work. The policy explicitly prohibits accessing company data over open or unsecured networks without a VPN, and employees are instructed to use trusted networks whenever possible.

results.question: What do RTO and RPO represent in continuity planning?
results.gold: RTO is target restore time; RPO is maximum acceptable data loss window.
results.answer: In continuity planning, RTO represents the target time to restore service, and RPO represents the maximum acceptable data loss window [doc_id=11_business_continuity_and_disaster_recovery_policy.md; title=11 business continuity and disaster recovery policy].

- Runbook
- Recovery procedure
- Contact roster
- Dependency map

## 11. Post-Event Review
After significant disruptions, teams perform review to capture timeline, impact, lessons learned, and resilience improvements.

## 12. Compliance
Compliance with this policy is monitored through control

Suspected security events must be reported immediately through the incident channel. Investigation, containment, communication, and post-incident review follow the Incident Response Playbook.

results.question: Within how many days should travel expenses generally be submitted after travel completion?
results.answer: Travel expenses should generally be submitted within 15 days of travel completion (doc_id=12_travel_and_expense_policy.md, title=12 travel and expense policy).

citations.title: 12 travel and expense policy

Corporate cards are for approved business purchases only. Personal use is prohibited.

Where per diem applies, employees must follow published rates and local legal requirements.

citations.title: 05 data classification and retention policy
citations.snippet:
## 6. Retention Schedule
Minimum schedule unless legal hold requires longer retention:
- HR personnel records: 7 years after separation
- Financial accounting records: 7 years
- Customer contracts: 7 years after expiration
- Security logs: 1 year minimum, 3 years for critical systems
- Support tickets: 2 years after closure
- Product analytics events: 18 months unless anonymize

## 7. Timelines
Standard response target is 30 days from verification, subject to lawful extension where complexity is high. Extensions must be communicated with reason.

## 8. Internal Fulfillment Workflow
- Privacy team triages request scope.
- Data owners gather records from systems of record.
